artifact_name: Bounded Paid Pilot Outreach Email v0.1
status: internal outreach draft, not legal-reviewed, not buyer-ready final copy
purpose: Introduce a bounded paid diagnostic pilot for one high-value AI-agent workflow without attaching the full strategic package or overclaiming.
standing_boundary_line: SpecShift Architectural Logic Diagnostics is a pre-deployment diagnostic and architecture-stage review process. It is not a benchmark, certification, compliance audit, runtime monitor, security tool, deployment approval, or guarantee of AI safety.
subject_options: Pre-deployment diagnostic review for AI-agent workflows
Mapping AI-agent workflow failure points before scale
Bounded diagnostic pilot for agentic workflow reliability
email_body:
Hi [Name],

AI-agent workflows can appear ready while still acting on weak evidence, stale system state, unclear authority, or unverified completion claims.

SpecShift Architectural Logic Diagnostics offers a bounded paid pilot for one high-value AI-agent workflow. The engagement uses synthetic stress scenarios to map where the workflow's reasoning, evidence handling, handoffs, escalation thresholds, and recovery paths may break before broader rollout.

This is a pre-deployment diagnostic and architecture-stage review process. It is not a benchmark, certification, compliance audit, runtime monitor, security tool, deployment approval, or guarantee of AI safety.

If useful, I would be glad to schedule a short scoping call to identify one workflow where this review could create immediate value.

Best,
Benjamin J. Clark
Founder, SpecShift Labs
shorter_email_body:
Hi [Name],

SpecShift Architectural Logic Diagnostics helps teams stress-test one high-value AI-agent workflow before scale, mapping where evidence handling, scope boundaries, handoffs, escalation thresholds, or recovery paths may break under synthetic review.

This is a bounded pre-deployment diagnostic, not a benchmark, certification, compliance audit, runtime monitor, or safety guarantee.

Would a short scoping call be useful to identify one workflow where this could create immediate value?

Best,
Benjamin J. Clark
Founder, SpecShift Labs
use_when: The recipient is involved with AI-agent workflows, automation, product, engineering, risk, or operations.
The goal is to open a paid pilot conversation, not explain the full stack.
The recipient has not yet asked for detailed collateral.
do_not_attach: Do not attach the full Strategic Evaluation Package cold.
Do not attach the Guardrail Checklist until buyer interest is established.
Do not include pricing tiers in the first cold email unless the buyer has already asked for commercial structure.
follow_up_offer: If the recipient responds, offer a 20-minute scoping call focused on one workflow, its inputs, system boundaries, approval points, handoffs, and failure consequences.
claim_boundary: This outreach email stops fitting if it is edited to imply validated performance, certification, compliance sign-off, runtime protection, deployment readiness, or guaranteed safety.
